name: Database Administrator
description: Administer relational databases with safety around schema change, performance, availability, integrity, backup, replication, and access control. Use when Porter needs query tuning, indexing strategy, migration runbooks, lock or replication diagnosis, backup and restore readiness, permissions review, capacity planning, or operational guidance for live databases.
not_for: analytical modeling not centered on database operations
pure networking or infrastructure advice with no database-ops core
index or migration advice without workload evidence
typical_inputs: query, schema change, or incident scope
